hero.headline: The sea doesn't sell dreams. It keeps them.
hero.sub: Discover a fleet built not to be owned — but to be lived.

manifesto.title: We don't build boats. We build horizons.
manifesto.lead: Every hull is an invitation: to slow down, to gather, to chase the light. This is water mobility designed around the life you want to live.

experiences.title: How the day unfolds on the water.

firstLight.title: First light
firstLight.body: Before the world wakes, the water is yours. Coffee on the bow, the horizon turning from ink to gold.

gathering.title: The gathering
gathering.body: Friends arrive, music rises, the deck becomes a stage. The afternoon stretches into something worth remembering.

longWay.title: The long way home
longWay.body: No rush, no route. Just the coastline drifting by and the quiet luxury of having nowhere to be.

stillness.title: Stillness
stillness.body: Engines silent, lights low. The kind of calm you can only find when the land lets go.

craft.title: Built to be trusted. Designed to be felt.
points: Premium materials chosen for the hand as much as the eye.
CE certification [[PLACEHOLDER]] — engineered to standard, refined beyond it.
Quiet propulsion that lets the water speak.
Detail honoured everywhere, even where it is never seen.

testimonials.title: The people who already cast off.

items.quote: We bought a boat and found a rhythm. Mornings are slower now, and somehow that is everything.
items.author: [[PLACEHOLDER — owner name]]

items.quote: The first weekend aboard, twelve of us watched the sun go down and nobody reached for a phone.
items.author: [[PLACEHOLDER — owner name]]

items.quote: Silence, made seaworthy — they were not exaggerating. It is the only place my mind finally rests.
items.author: [[PLACEHOLDER — owner name]]

contact.title: Tell us the story you want to live.
contact.lead: No pressure, no sales pitch. Just a conversation about what's possible.

form.name: Your name
form.message: Tell us a little about the story you have in mind
form.consent: I agree to be contacted about my enquiry and have read the privacy policy.
form.success: Thank you. Your message is on its way — we'll be in touch soon.
form.error: Something went wrong sending your message. Please try again or email us directly.

banner.text: We use cookies to understand how the site is used and to improve your experience. Non-essential cookies stay off until you accept them.

modal.title: Cookie preferences
modal.descNecessary: Required for the site to function. These cannot be switched off and store no personal data beyond what is essential.
modal.descAnalytics: Help us understand how visitors use the site, so we can improve the experience. Off by default.
modal.descMarketing: Used to make any future advertising more relevant. Off by default.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy explains how [[COMPANY_NAME]] processes personal data collected through this website, in accordance with the GDPR.
privacy.controllerBody: The controller of your personal data is [[COMPANY_NAME]], [[COMPANY_ADDRESS]], [[COMPANY_TAX_ID]]. Contact: [[COMPANY_EMAIL]].
privacy.dataBody: When you use the contact form we process the name, email address and message content you provide. We also process anonymous usage data only if you consent to analytics cookies.
privacy.purposeBody: To respond to your enquiry (legitimate interest / steps prior to a contract) and, with consent, to measure and improve the website.
privacy.rightsBody: You have the right to access, rectify, erase, restrict and port your data, and to object to processing. To exercise these rights contact [[COMPANY_EMAIL]]. You may also lodge a complaint with the supervisory authority [[SUPERVISORY_AUTHORITY]].
privacy.retentionBody: Enquiry data is kept only as long as needed to handle your request and any resulting relationship, then deleted. [[PLACEHOLDER — retention period]]

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.intro: This Cookie Policy describes the cookies and similar technologies used on this website operated by [[COMPANY_NAME]].
cookies.whatBody: Cookies are small text files stored on your device. We use them to keep the site working and, with your consent, to understand usage.
cookies.necessaryBody: Always active. Store your cookie consent choice and keep the site functioning. [[PLACEHOLDER — list of necessary cookies]]
cookies.analyticsBody: Off by default. With consent, Google Analytics 4 helps us measure traffic and improve the site. [[PLACEHOLDER — list of analytics cookies]]
cookies.marketingBody: Off by default. Reserved for any future advertising measurement. [[PLACEHOLDER — list of marketing cookies]]
cookies.manageBody: You can change or withdraw your consent at any time via the "Cookie settings" link in the footer.

aurora.tagline: For those who chase the first light.
aurora.story: A yacht for couples and solo sailors chasing the horizon — long ranges, quiet mornings, coffee at dawn on the bow. Aurora is made for the hours before anyone else is awake, when the sea belongs to you alone.
aurora.idealFor: Solo dawn voyages · weekend escapes for two · longer journeys along the coast.

festa.tagline: Where the day turns into a celebration.
festa.story: A spacious deck-as-stage for days with friends and family — swims, music, laughter, sunsets. Festa is built for the gatherings that turn an ordinary afternoon into a memory worth keeping.
festa.idealFor: Celebrations with friends · family days on the water · floating events.

serenite.story: An escape and a place to be still — daybeds, the hush of electric propulsion, intimate luxury. Sérénité is the quiet between everything else, designed for the moments you want to last.
serenite.idealFor: Rest and stillness · romantic evenings · yoga and wellness on the water.

yachtsCommon.specsNote: Figures are indicative and may vary by configuration.

home.title: MARÉ — Stories the sea remembers
home.description: A cinematic fleet built not to be owned, but to be lived. Discover MARÉ — yachts designed around the life you want on the water.

fleet.title: {name} — MARÉ
fleet.description: Meet {name}: {tagline} Explore the story, specifications and gallery of this MARÉ yacht.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy — MARÉ
privacy.description: How MARÉ processes personal data collected through this website, in line with the GDPR.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy — MARÉ
cookies.description: The cookies and similar technologies used on the MARÉ website, and how to manage your choices.
